chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 525 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 06.10.2025 Mrs. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2020 without any progress, even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Even today counsel seeks time for no cogent reason. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
